nameMeanings.name: Banks
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Bank 5, with excrescent -s. The final -s may occasionally represent a plural form, but it is most commonly an arbitrary addition made after the main period of surname formation, perhaps under the influence of patronymic forms with a possessive -s.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Bruacháin ‘descendant of Bruachán’, a byname for a large-bellied person. The English form was chosen because of a mistaken association of the Gaelic name with bruach ‘bank’. Compare Bank 6.

variants.name: Bank
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Mort, Ari, Avraham, Galit, Hyman, Isadore, Mirra, Zvia.

German, Dutch, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German or Middle Low German banc, or Yiddish bank ‘bench, table, counter’, in any of various senses, e.g. a metonymic occupational name for anyone whose work required a bench or counter, for example a butcher, baker, court official, or money changer. The surname of German is also found in Poland and in Czechia.
Danish and Swedish: topographic name from bank ‘(sand)bank’ or a habitational name from a farm named with this word.

variants.name: Bangs
meanings: History: Edward Bangs of Chichester, England, came to Plymouth Colony on board the ‘Anne’ in 1623; he is believed to have been born c. 1592.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Banks was born in 1510, in Giggleswick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Isabella Lister in 1529. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1547, in Bank Newton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Banks(은)는 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지글레스윅에서 태어났다. 그는 1529년 Isabella Lister(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1547년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 뱅크 뉴턴에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.
